name: odyssey
description: Typed, evidence-led Hyperchart report engine with a deterministic self-contained HTML renderer.

scripts.test:eink: npm run render:example && HTML_FILE=artifacts/eink-report.html OUTPUT_DIR=artifacts/playwright tsx tests/renderer-playwright.ts
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run test:contracts && npm run test:renderer && npm run test:eink && npm run test:workflow-fixture
